---
title: "Isobath Corridors"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Isobath Corridors}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

```{r setup}
library(blueterra)
```

Isobath corridors summarize terrain near depth contours. This workflow uses any
user-supplied raster supported by `terra`; it does not require BlueTopo or any
remote service.

```{r data}
bathy <- read_bathy(blueterra_example("bathy"))
terrain <- derive_terrain(bathy, metrics = c("slope", "bpi", "roughness"))
```

The example bathymetry stores depths as negative elevation, so depths are passed
as negative contour values:

```{r isobaths}
isobaths <- extract_isobaths(bathy, depths = c(-40, -60))
isobaths
```

Buffers are measured in map units, so projected CRS are recommended:

```{r corridors}
corridors <- make_isobath_corridors(bathy, depths = c(-40, -60), width = 20)
summarize_isobath_terrain(terrain, corridors)
```
